expectations.text: Report file is saved as a markdown file at the specified output path
Report contains a Recommendation section with explicit BUY, SELL, or HOLD action
expectations.evidence: Line 11: 'Action: HOLD (accumulate on weakness, not a chase)'

expectations.text: Report contains Conviction level (High, Medium, or Low)
Report contains a Time Horizon for the recommendation
Report has an Executive Summary section
expectations.evidence: '## Executive Summary' present with coherent thesis

expectations.text: Report has a Quality Metrics Dashboard with Piotroski F-Score, Altman Z-Score, ROIC, and FCF Yield
expectations.evidence: Dashboard with F-Score ~7/9, Z-Score N/A (noted as not robust for mega-cap tech), ROIC 23.85%, FCF Yield ~2.55%

expectations.text: Report has a Valuation Summary section with P/E, EV/EBITDA, or P/S multiples
Report includes an intrinsic value estimate or margin of safety calculation
expectations.evidence: Intrinsic Value Estimate: $410, Margin of Safety: ~0%

expectations.text: Report has a Scenario Analysis with bull, base, and bear cases
Report has an Options Analysis section
expectations.evidence: '## Options Analysis' with IV environment, flow analysis, and 3 strategy alternatives

expectations.text: Report contains actual current MSFT price data (not fabricated)
expectations.evidence: $409.41 — consistent with real MSFT price data

expectations.text: Report has a Sources section with references
expectations.evidence: 14 sources with hyperlinks including Microsoft IR, Finviz, Macrotrends, Barchart, AlphaQuery

expectations.text: Report includes comparison to market benchmarks (S&P 500 or Nasdaq)
expectations.evidence: SPY, QQQ, XLK comparisons in header and peer comparison table

expectations.text: Options Analysis contains numeric IV Rank or IV Percentile values (not N/A or unavailable)
expectations.evidence: IV Rank: 38%, IV Percentile: 80% — sourced from Barchart and AlphaQuery

expectations.text: Valuation Summary includes historical averages for comparison (not all N/A)
expectations.evidence: Historical Avg column: P/E ~33x (5Y), P/S ~11.6x (5Y), P/B ~11.1x (5Y)

expectations.text: Report states what would invalidate the thesis (invalidation criteria)
expectations.evidence: Dedicated '## Invalidation / Kill Switch' section: Azure growth <30% for 2Q AND stock below $345 with weakening fundamentals
